microsoft/vscode.title: Intelligent Code Editing
microsoft/vscode.desc: VS Code offers rich code completion powered by IntelliSense, providing smart suggestions for variables, methods, and modules based on language semantics.

microsoft/vscode.title: Built-in Git Support
microsoft/vscode.desc: Review diffs, stage files, make commits, push and pull from any hosted SCM service — all from within the editor.

microsoft/vscode.title: Extensions Marketplace
microsoft/vscode.desc: Customize VS Code with thousands of extensions for languages, debuggers, themes, and developer tools.

microsoft/vscode.title: Integrated Terminal
microsoft/vscode.desc: Use the terminal directly from VS Code, running shell commands from any location with full support for bash, zsh, fish, and more.

torvalds/linux.title: The World's Largest Open Source Kernel
torvalds/linux.desc: The Linux kernel is the heart of billions of devices worldwide, from smartphones to supercomputers.

torvalds/linux.title: Massive Contributor Community
torvalds/linux.desc: Thousands of developers worldwide contribute patches, bug fixes, and features to the Linux kernel every release cycle.

torvalds/linux.title: Subsystems Architecture
torvalds/linux.desc: Linux is organized into subsystems — networking, memory management, filesystems, drivers — each maintained by dedicated engineers.

tensorflow/tensorflow.title: End-to-End Machine Learning
tensorflow/tensorflow.desc: TensorFlow provides a comprehensive, flexible ecosystem of tools and libraries for building and deploying ML models at scale.

tensorflow/tensorflow.title: Keras High-Level API
tensorflow/tensorflow.desc: TensorFlow's Keras API makes it easy to build and train deep learning models with just a few lines of code.

tensorflow/tensorflow.title: Production Deployment
tensorflow/tensorflow.desc: Deploy models to any environment — cloud, on-device, browser, or edge — with TensorFlow Serving and TensorFlow Lite.

facebook/react.title: Component-Based Architecture
facebook/react.desc: Build encapsulated components that manage their own state, then compose them to make complex UIs.

facebook/react.title: Declarative Views
facebook/react.desc: React makes it painless to create interactive UIs. Design simple views for each state and React efficiently updates and renders components.

facebook/react.title: Learn Once, Write Anywhere
facebook/react.desc: React Native lets you build mobile apps using only JavaScript, while React DOM handles web rendering.

vuejs/vue.title: Progressive Framework
vuejs/vue.desc: Vue is designed from the ground up to be incrementally adoptable. It scales between a library and a full-featured framework.

vuejs/vue.title: Reactive Data Binding
vuejs/vue.desc: Vue's reactivity system automatically tracks dependencies and efficiently updates the DOM when data changes.

vuejs/vue.title: Single File Components
vuejs/vue.desc: Vue's .vue files let you co-locate template, logic, and styles in a single file for better organization.
